title: Peppery Japanese Colby Jack Cheese Stir-fry
description: A spicy and savory dish featuring Japanese-style stir-frying with a blend of colby jack cheese for an adventurous yet high-protein-friendly meal.
instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sesame seeds and cook for about 30 seconds until golden brown.
Add chicken slices to the heated pan, stirring occasionally until cooked through (about 5-7 minutes).
Remove chicken from pan and set aside. In the same pan, add oyster sauce, soy sauce, garlic, bell peppers, scallions, and pepper flakes. Stir-fry for about 3 minutes.
Add rice vinegar to the stir-fried vegetables and cook for another minute until slightly reduced.
Return chicken to the pan with the vegetable mixture. Mix in grated colby jack cheese and stir quickly to combine (about 1 minute).
Thicken the sauce by adding cornstarch water mixture, stirring continuously to avoid burning.
